title: Everyday Vocabulary
shortSummary: Build your core vocabulary for daily life — family, home, body, colours, weather, animals, and common objects. These are the words that appear in every conversation and form the building blocks of fluency.
whyItMatters: You cannot form sentences without words. This module focuses on the highest-frequency vocabulary you need for daily life — the words that cover 80% of casual conversation. Learning these words first is the fastest path to being understood.
coreConcepts: Family members: madre, padre, hermano, hermana
Parts of the body: cabeza, mano, ojo, boca
Colours: rojo, azul, verde, amarillo, blanco, negro
Weather: hace calor, hace frío, llueve, está nublado
Common objects: mesa, silla, puerta, ventana
Food basics: pan, agua, leche, carne, fruta
